title: Bruins need to look themselves in mirror after embarrassing performance on home ice
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins “Man to man in here, if we're not f------ embarrassed with what just happened, then I don't know what to say.
" David Pastrnak and the Bruins are now on the brink of a season-ending loss.
Matthew J.

title: Mike Minogue wins GOP endorsement for governor in landslide
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Politics Fellow candidate Brian Shortsleeve also garnered enough votes to make it on the ballot for September's primary, while Mike Kennealy ended his campaign.
Mike Minogue candidate for governor spoke to the media briefly at the Massachusetts GOP Convention in Worcester on April, 25, 2026.
Jonathan Wiggs/The Boston Globe ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: Joe Mazzulla gives his take on Alex Cora’s firing by Red Sox
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Joe Mazzulla is now Boston's longest-tenured head coach after the Red Sox fired Alex Cora on Saturday.
Mazzulla praised Cora's relationship-building skills and his ability to communicate with players effectively.
The Red Sox appointed Chad Tracy as interim manager and won their first game post-Cora against the Orioles.

title: What Marco Sturm said about Jeremy Swayman yelling at the Bruins bench in blowout loss​
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins "It was not his fault today, I can tell you that.
I felt bad for him.
" Jeremy Swayman was not thrilled after getting the hook in Game 4.
